hooks.command: echo '{"hookSpecificOutput":{"hookEventName":"SessionStart","additionalContext":"This project has a /styleguide skill with the full design token reference, Tailwind 4 gotchas, and styleguide rules. Invoke it before making any visual or style changes."}}'

FILE=$(jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // empty' 2>/dev/null); echo "$FILE" | grep -qE '(globals\.css|lib/tokens\.ts)' && echo '{"hookSpecificOutput":{"hookEventName":"PostToolUse","additionalContext":"SYNC CHECK — You edited a styleguide source file. app/globals.css and lib/tokens.ts must always be 1:1. If you changed a token value in globals.css (color, size, spacing), update lib/tokens.ts to match. If you changed lib/tokens.ts, ensure globals.css reflects it. The styleguide page (app/styleguide/page.tsx) derives all display values from lib/tokens.ts and will be in sync automatically."}}' || true
